    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en" dir="ltr" class="dark">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>GitiNavard</title>
    <style>
    /* پس‌زمینه تمام‌صفحه تیره نیمه‌شفاف */
    #password-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    z-index: 9999;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
    }
    /* کارت ورود رمز */
    .password-card {
    background: white;
    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    text-align: center;
    width: 320px;
    max-width: 90%;
    animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease;
    }
    @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .password-card h2 {
    margin-top: 0;
    color: #333;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    }
    .password-card input[type="password"] {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    margin: 20px 0;
    border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    outline: none;
    transition: border 0.3s;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    .password-card input[type="password"]:focus {
    border-color: #4a90e2;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.15);
    }
    .password-card button {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 14px;
    background: #4a90e2;
    color: white;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: bold;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.1s;
    }
    .password-card button:hover {
    background: #357abd;
    }
    .password-card button:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    }
    .error-message {
    color: #e74c3c;
    margin-top: 15px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    display: none; /* مخفی تا وقتی خطا رخ دهد */
    }
    </style>
    <style>
    :root {
    --bg: #edf2f7;
    --surface: #ffffff;
    --text: #1a202c;
    --text-secondary: #4a5568;
    --border: #cbd5e0;
    --accent: #667eea;
    --accent-hover: #5a67d8;
    --danger: #e53e3e;
    --shadow: 0 2px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    color-scheme: light;
    }
    .dark {
    --bg: #1a202c;
    --surface: #2d3748;
    --text: #e2e8f0;
    --text-secondary: #a0aec0;
    --border: #4a5568;
    --shadow: 0 2px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    color-scheme: dark;
    }
    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg); color: var(--text);
    height: 100vh; width: 100vw; overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    user-select: none; -webkit-user-select: none;
    transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }
    #toolbar {
    background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 8px 16px; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
    align-items: center; z-index: 100; box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    }
    .btn, select {
    background: var(--accent); color: white; border: none;
    padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .btn:active { transform: translateY(0); }
    .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--border); }
    .tool-btn.active {
    background: var(--accent); color: white; border-color: var(--accent);
    }
    .separator { width:1px; height:24px; background:var(--border); margin:0 4px; }
    select {
    background: var(--surface); color: var(--text);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 6px 8px;
    }
    #canvasContainer {
    flex: 1; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--bg); cursor: grab;
    }
    #canvasContainer.painting { cursor: crosshair; }
    #canvasContainer.rectangle { cursor: crosshair; }
    #canvasContainer.select { cursor: crosshair; }
    canvas {
    position: absolute; top:0; left:0;
    image-rendering: pixelated;
    image-rendering: crisp-edges;
    }
    #palettePanel {
    position: absolute; bottom: 80px; left: 20px;
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    display: none; z-index: 50; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
    min-width: 200px;
    }
    #palettePanel.visible { display: flex; }
    .palette-title { font-size:12px; color:var(--text-secondary); text-align:center; margin-bottom:4px; }
    #colorSwatches { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:4px; justify-content:center; }
    .swatch {
    width:24px; height:24px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid var(--border);
    cursor:pointer; transition: transform 0.1s;
    }
    .swatch:hover { transform: scale(1.2); }
    .swatch.active { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent); }
    .palette-nav {
    display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-top:4px;
    }
    .palette-nav button {
    background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:4px;
    width:24px; height:24px; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    .brush-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; justify-content:center; }
    #brushSize { width:80px; }
    #infoOverlay {
    position:absolute; bottom:80px; right:20px;
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px; padding:12px; box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    display:none; z-index:50; font-size:13px; color:var(--text-secondary);
    }
    #infoOverlay.visible { display:block; }
    #historyDropdown {
    position:absolute; top:60px; left:20px;
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px; padding:12px; box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    display:none; z-index:200; max-height:300px; overflow-y:auto; min-width:250px;
    }
    .history-item {
    padding:6px 8px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:6px;
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    }
    .history-item:hover { background:var(--border); }
    #dashboard {
    position:absolute; top:60px; right:20px;
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px; padding:16px; box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    display:none; z-index:200; font-size:14px;
    }
    #dragOverlay {
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;
    background:rgba(102,126,234,0.2); border:4px dashed var(--accent);
    display:none; justify-content:center; align-items:center;
    font-size:24px; color:var(--accent); z-index:999;
    }
    #tooltip {
    position:absolute; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:6px; padding:2px 6px; font-size:12px; pointer-events:none;
    display:none; z-index:100; white-space:nowrap;
    }
    #selectionsPanel {
    height: 70px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    gap: 8px;
    z-index: 50;
    }
    .sel-thumb {
    width: 56px; height: 56px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: #fff;
    }
    .sel-thumb.active {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent);
    }
    .sel-thumb img {
    max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;
    image-rendering: pixelated;
    }
    .sel-label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 2px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    font-size: 10px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    color: white;
    padding: 0 4px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #statusBar {
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 12px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    z-index: 40;
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- صفحه ورود رمز مدرن -->
    <div id="password-overlay">
    <div class="password-card">
    <h2>Enter Password</h2>
    <input type="password" id="password-input" placeholder="Password" autofocus>
    <button onclick="checkPassword()">Submit</button>
    <p class="error-message" id="error-msg">Incorrect password. Please try again.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="dragOverlay" data-i18n="dropHere">Drop file here</div>
    <div id="toolbar">
    <button class="btn" id="openBtn" data-i18n="open">📂 Open</button>
    <button class="btn" id="saveBtn" data-i18n="save">💾 Save</button>
    <button class="btn" id="batchBtn" data-i18n="batch">📁 Batch Convert</button>
    <div class="separator"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-outline tool-btn" id="paintToolBtn" data-tool="paint" data-i18n="paint">🖌️ Paint</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline tool-btn" id="rectToolBtn" data-tool="rectangle" data-i18n="rect">◻️ Rectangle</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline tool-btn" id="selectToolBtn" data-tool="select" data-i18n="select">✂️ Select</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="undoBtn" disabled data-i18n="undo">↩️ Undo</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="redoBtn" disabled data-i18n="redo">↪️ Redo</button>
    <div class="separator"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="infoBtn" data-i18n="info">ℹ️ Details</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="historyBtn" data-i18n="history">🕒 History</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="dashboardBtn" data-i18n="dashboard">📊 Dashboard</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" id="darkModeToggle">🌓</button>
    <select id="langSelect">
    <option value="en">English</option>
    <option value="ru">Русский</option>
    <option value="tr">Türkçe</option>
    <option value="zh">中文</option>
    <option value="fa">فارسی</option>
    </select>
    <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="image/*,.ep" hidden>
    <input type="file" id="batchInput" accept=".ep" multiple hidden>
    </div>
    <div id="canvasContainer">
    <canvas id="displayCanvas"></canvas>
    <div id="palettePanel">
    <div class="palette-title" data-i18n="paletteTitle">Image Colors</div>
    <div id="colorSwatches"></div>
    <div class="palette-nav">
    <button id="palettePrev">◀</button>
    <span id="palettePageInfo">1/1</span>
    <button id="paletteNext">▶</button>
    </div>
    <div class="brush-row">
    <span style="font-size:12px;" data-i18n="brushSize">Brush size:</span>
    <input type="range" id="brushSize" min="1" max="20" value="1">
    <span id="brushSizeVal">1</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="infoOverlay"></div>
    <div id="historyDropdown"></div>
    <div id="dashboard">
    <div><strong data-i18n="dashTitle">Dashboard</strong></div>
    <div id="dashboardContent"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="tooltip"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="selectionsPanel"></div>
    <div id="statusBar">Ready</div>
    <!-- ====================== EP-LIB (Global) ====================== -->
    <script>
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // کتابخانه EP-Lib – نسخهٔ سراسری (بدون ماژول)
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    const MAX_WIDTH = 65535;
    const MAX_HEIGHT = 65535;
    const HEADER_SIZE = 34;
    const TAG_MAX_LENGTH = 14;
    class EPError extends Error {
    constructor(message) {
    super(message);
    this.name = 'EPError';
    }
    }
    class Bitmap {
    constructor(width, height, data = null) {
    if (!Number.isInteger(width) || width < 1 || width > MAX_WIDTH) {
    throw new EPError(`عرض باید بین ۱ و ${MAX_WIDTH} باشد`);
    }
    if (!Number.isInteger(height) || height < 1 || height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
    throw new EPError(`ارتفاع باید بین ۱ و ${MAX_HEIGHT} باشد`);
    }
    this.width = width;
    this.height = height;
    this.rowBytes = Math.ceil(width / 8);
    this._data = data ? new Uint8Array(data) : new Uint8Array(this.rowBytes * height);
    if (this._data.length !== this.rowBytes * height) {
    throw new EPError('طول داده‌های پیکسلی با ابعاد همخوانی ندارد');
    }
    }
    getPixel(x, y) {
    if (x < 0 || x >= this.width || y < 0 || y >= this.height) return 0;
    const byteIndex = y * this.rowBytes + Math.floor(x / 8);
    const bitMask = 1 << (x % 8);
    return (this._data[byteIndex] & bitMask) ? 1 : 0;
    }
    setPixel(x, y, value) {
    if (x < 0 || x >= this.width || y < 0 || y >= this.height) return;
    const byteIndex = y * this.rowBytes + Math.floor(x / 8);
    const bitMask = 1 << (x % 8);
    if (value) this._data[byteIndex] |= bitMask;
    else this._data[byteIndex] &= ~bitMask;
    }
    clear() { this._data.fill(0); }
    clone() { return new Bitmap(this.width, this.height, this._data.slice()); }
    toImageData() {
    const imgData = new ImageData(this.width, this.height);
    const pixels = imgData.data;
    for (let y = 0; y < this.height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < this.width; x++) {
    const idx = (y * this.width + x) * 4;
    const val = this.getPixel(x, y) ? 0 : 255;
    pixels[idx] = val;
    pixels[idx + 1] = val;
    pixels[idx + 2] = val;
    pixels[idx + 3] = 255;
    }
    }
    return imgData;
    }
    static fromImageData(imageData) {
    const { width, height } = imageData;
    const bitmap = new Bitmap(width, height);
    for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
    const idx = (y * width + x) * 4;
    const gray = imageData.data[idx] * 0.299 + imageData.data[idx + 1] * 0.587 + imageData.data[idx + 2] * 0.114;
    bitmap.setPixel(x, y, gray < 128 ? 1 : 0);
    }
    }
    return bitmap;
    }
    }
    class EP {
    static buildHeader(width, height, tag = '') {
    if (width < 1 || width > MAX_WIDTH || height < 1 || height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
    throw new EPError(`ابعاد خارج از محدوده مجاز (حداکثر ${MAX_WIDTH}x${MAX_HEIGHT})`);
    }
    const header = new Uint8Array(HEADER_SIZE);
    header[0] = 0x00; header[1] = 0x00; header[2] = 0x00;
    header[3] = height & 0xFF;
    header[4] = (height >> 8) & 0xFF;
    const ascii = new TextEncoder().encode(`${width}a${height}\0`);
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(ascii.length, 9); i++) header[6 + i] = ascii[i];
    header[15] = 0x04;
    const tagBytes = new TextEncoder().encode(tag.substring(0, TAG_MAX_LENGTH));
    for (let i = 0; i < tagBytes.length; i++) header[16 + i] = tagBytes[i];
    if (tagBytes.length < TAG_MAX_LENGTH) header[16 + tagBytes.length] = 0x00;
    else header[30] = 0x00;
    header[31] = 0x02;
    const val = width - 32;
    header[32] = val & 0xFF;
    header[33] = (val >> 8) & 0xFF;
    return header;
    }
    static parseHeader(header) {
    if (header.length < HEADER_SIZE) throw new EPError(`هدر باید حداقل ${HEADER_SIZE} بایت باشد`);
    const height = header[3] | (header[4] << 8);
    const width = (header[32] | (header[33] << 8)) + 32;
    if (width < 1 || width > MAX_WIDTH || height < 1 || height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
    throw new EPError(`ابعاد نامعتبر در هدر: ${width}x${height}`);
    }
    const tagBytes = [];
    for (let i = 16; i < 30; i++) {
    if (header[i] === 0) break;
    tagBytes.push(header[i]);
    }
    const tag = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: false }).decode(new Uint8Array(tagBytes));
    return { width, height, tag };
    }
    static packPixels(bitmap) {
    const { width, height } = bitmap;
    const rowBytes = Math.ceil(width / 8);
    const data = new Uint8Array(rowBytes * height);
    for (let yFile = 0; yFile < height; yFile++) {
    const srcY = height - 1 - yFile;
    const destOff = yFile * rowBytes;
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
    if (bitmap.getPixel(x, srcY)) {
    const byteIdx = destOff + Math.floor(x / 8);
    data[byteIdx] |= (1 << (x % 8));
    }
    }
    }
    return data;
    }
    static unpackPixels(bitmap, data) {
    const { width, height } = bitmap;
    const rowBytes = Math.ceil(width / 8);
    if (data.length !== rowBytes * height) throw new EPError('اندازه داده‌های پیکسلی با ابعاد همخوانی ندارد');
    for (let yFile = 0; yFile < height; yFile++) {
    const destY = height - 1 - yFile;
    const srcOff = yFile * rowBytes;
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
    const byteIdx = srcOff + Math.floor(x / 8);
    const bit = (data[byteIdx] >> (x % 8)) & 1;
    bitmap.setPixel(x, destY, bit);
    }
    }
    }
    static read(buffer) {
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(buffer);
    if (bytes.length < HEADER_SIZE) throw new EPError('فایل خیلی کوچک است');
    const header = bytes.slice(0, HEADER_SIZE);
    const { width, height, tag } = this.parseHeader(header);
    const rowBytes = Math.ceil(width / 8);
    const expectedSize = HEADER_SIZE + rowBytes * height;
    if (bytes.length < expectedSize) throw new EPError('داده‌های پیکسلی ناقص است');
    const pixelData = bytes.slice(HEADER_SIZE, HEADER_SIZE + rowBytes * height);
    const bitmap = new Bitmap(width, height);
    this.unpackPixels(bitmap, pixelData);
    return { bitmap, tag };
    }
    static write(bitmap, tag = '') {
    const header = this.buildHeader(bitmap.width, bitmap.height, tag);
    const pixels = this.packPixels(bitmap);
    const totalLength = header.length + pixels.length;
    const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(totalLength);
    const result = new Uint8Array(buffer);
    result.set(header, 0);
    result.set(pixels, header.length);
    return buffer;
    }
    static toBlob(bitmap, tag = '') {
    const buffer = this.write(bitmap, tag);
    return new Blob([buffer], { type: 'application/octet-stream' });
    }
    }
    </script>
    <!-- ====================== MAIN APPLICATION ====================== -->
    <script>
    (function() {
    // ----- state -----
    const state = {
    currentImage: null,
    originalImageData: null,
    zoom: 1,
    offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0,
    currentTool: null,
    brushColor: null,
    brushSize: 1,
    undoStack: [],
    redoStack: [],
    historyDB: null,
    loadedFilesCount: 0,
    totalMemory: 0,
    paletteColors: [],
    palettePage: 0,
    palettePerPage: 8,
    gridThreshold: 4,
    meta: null,
    selections: [],
    activeSelectionIndex: null,
    currentFileName: null,
    };
    // ----- translations (5 languages) -----
    const translations = {
    en: {
    dropHere: "Drop file here", open: "📂 Open", save: "💾 Save",
    batch: "📁 Batch Convert", paint: "🖌️ Paint", rect: "◻️ Rectangle",
    select: "✂️ Select", info: "ℹ️ Details", history: "🕒 History",
    dashboard: "📊 Dashboard", paletteTitle: "Image Colors", brushSize: "Brush size:",
    dashTitle: "Dashboard", filesLoaded: "Files loaded:", memoryUsage: "Memory usage:",
    undoLevels: "Undo levels:", noImage: "No file selected", noHistory: "History is empty",
    epError: "Error processing EP: ", unsupported: "Unsupported file format",
    onlyImageOrEP: "Please select an image or .ep file", undo: "↩️ Undo", redo: "↪️ Redo",
    filename: "Filename:", dimensions: "Dimensions:", rawWidth: "Raw width:", factor: "Factor:",
    bytesPerRow: "Bytes per row:", alertConvertError: "Error converting: ",
    saveDialog: "Save file as:", epNameInvalid: "EP name must be 1-8 ASCII characters (letters, digits).",
    saveOk: "File saved successfully.", saveVerifyFail: "Warning: Saved EP may not match original.",
    mouseCoord: "X: {x}, Y: {y} | Value: {v}"
    },
    ru: {
    dropHere: "Перетащите файл сюда", open: "📂 Открыть", save: "💾 Сохранить",
    batch: "📁 Пакетное преобразование", paint: "🖌️ Рисовать", rect: "◻️ Прямоугольник",
    select: "✂️ Выделение", info: "ℹ️ Информация", history: "🕒 История",
    dashboard: "📊 Панель", paletteTitle: "Цвета изображения", brushSize: "Размер кисти:",
    dashTitle: "Панель управления", filesLoaded: "Загружено файлов:", memoryUsage: "Использование памяти:",
    undoLevels: "Уровни отмены:", noImage: "Файл не выбран", noHistory: "История пуста",
    epError: "Ошибка обработки EP: ", unsupported: "Неподдерживаемый формат",
    onlyImageOrEP: "Выберите изображение или файл .ep", undo: "↩️ Отменить", redo: "↪️ Повторить",
    filename: "Имя файла:", dimensions: "Размеры:", rawWidth: "Исходная ширина:", factor: "Коэффициент:",
    bytesPerRow: "Байт на строку:", alertConvertError: "Ошибка преобразования: ",
    saveDialog: "Сохранить файл как:", epNameInvalid: "Имя EP должно содержать 1-8 символов ASCII (буквы, цифры).",
    saveOk: "Файл успешно сохранён.", saveVerifyFail: "Внимание: Сохранённый EP может не соответствовать оригиналу.",
    mouseCoord: "X: {x}, Y: {y} | Значение: {v}"
    },
    tr: {
    dropHere: "Dosyayı buraya bırakın", open: "📂 Aç", save: "💾 Kaydet",
    batch: "📁 Toplu Dönüştür", paint: "🖌️ Boya", rect: "◻️ Dikdörtgen",
    select: "✂️ Seçim", info: "ℹ️ Detaylar", history: "🕒 Geçmiş",
    dashboard: "📊 Panel", paletteTitle: "Resim Renkleri", brushSize: "Fırça boyutu:",
    dashTitle: "Panel", filesLoaded: "Yüklenen dosya:", memoryUsage: "Bellek kullanımı:",
    undoLevels: "Geri alma düzeyi:", noImage: "Dosya seçilmedi", noHistory: "Geçmiş boş",
    epError: "EP işleme hatası: ", unsupported: "Desteklenmeyen dosya formatı",
    onlyImageOrEP: "Lütfen bir resim veya .ep dosyası seçin", undo: "↩️ Geri Al", redo: "↪️ Yinele",
    filename: "Dosya adı:", dimensions: "Boyutlar:", rawWidth: "Ham genişlik:", factor: "Faktör:",
    bytesPerRow: "Satır başına bayt:", alertConvertError: "Dönüştürme hatası: ",
    saveDialog: "Dosyayı farklı kaydet:", epNameInvalid: "EP adı 1-8 ASCII karakter (harf, rakam) olmalı.",
    saveOk: "Dosya başarıyla kaydedildi.", saveVerifyFail: "Uyarı: Kaydedilen EP dosyası orijinal görüntüyle eşleşmeyebilir.",
    mouseCoord: "X: {x}, Y: {y} | Değer: {v}"
    },
    zh: {
    dropHere: "拖放文件到此处", open: "📂 打开", save: "💾 保存",
    batch: "📁 批量转换", paint: "🖌️ 绘画", rect: "◻️ 矩形",
    select: "✂️ 选择", info: "ℹ️ 详情", history: "🕒 历史",
    dashboard: "📊 仪表板", paletteTitle: "图像颜色", brushSize: "画笔大小:",
    dashTitle: "仪表板", filesLoaded: "已加载文件数:", memoryUsage: "内存使用:",
    undoLevels: "撤销级别:", noImage: "未选择文件", noHistory: "历史为空",
    epError: "EP处理错误: ", unsupported: "不支持的文件格式",
    onlyImageOrEP: "请选择图像或 .ep 文件", undo: "↩️ 撤销", redo: "↪️ 重做",
    filename: "文件名:", dimensions: "尺寸:", rawWidth: "原始宽度:", factor: "因子:",
    bytesPerRow: "每行字节数:", alertConvertError: "转换错误: ",
    saveDialog: "另存为:", epNameInvalid: "EP名称必须为1-8个ASCII字符（字母、数字）。",
    saveOk: "文件保存成功。", saveVerifyFail: "警告：保存的EP文件可能与原始图像不匹配。",
    mouseCoord: "X: {x}, Y: {y} | 值: {v}"
    },
    fa: {
    dropHere: "فایل را اینجا رها کنید", open: "📂 باز کردن", save: "💾 ذخیره",
    batch: "📁 تبدیل گروهی", paint: "🖌️ نقاشی", rect: "◻️ مستطیل",
    select: "✂️ انتخاب", info: "ℹ️ جزئیات", history: "🕒 تاریخچه",
    dashboard: "📊 داشبورد", paletteTitle: "رنگ‌های تصویر", brushSize: "سایز قلم:",
    dashTitle: "داشبورد", filesLoaded: "فایل‌های بارگذاری شده:", memoryUsage: "مصرف حافظه:",
    undoLevels: "سطوح Undo:", noImage: "فایلی انتخاب نشده", noHistory: "تاریخچه خالی است",
    epError: "خطا در پردازش EP: ", unsupported: "فرمت فایل پشتیبانی نمی‌شود",
    onlyImageOrEP: "لطفاً یک تصویر یا فایل .ep انتخاب کنید", undo: "↩️ لغو", redo: "↪️ بازانجام",
    filename: "نام فایل:", dimensions: "ابعاد:", rawWidth: "عرض خام:", factor: "ضریب:",
    bytesPerRow: "بایت در ردیف:", alertConvertError: "خطا در تبدیل: ",
    saveDialog: "ذخیره فایل با نام:", epNameInvalid: "نام EP باید ۱ تا ۸ کاراکتر ASCII (حروف، اعداد) باشد.",
    saveOk: "فایل با موفقیت ذخیره شد.", saveVerifyFail: "هشدار: فایل EP ذخیره‌شده ممکن است با تصویر اصلی مطابقت نداشته باشد.",
    mouseCoord: "X: {x}, Y: {y} | مقدار: {v}"
    }
    };
    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('ep-lang') || 'en';
    function t(key, params) {
    let str = translations[currentLang]?.[key] || translations.en[key] || key;
    if (params) for (const k in params) str = str.replace(`{${k}}`, params[k]);
    return str;
    }
    // ----- DOM elements -----
    const container = document.getElementById('canvasContainer');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('displayCanvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
    const palettePanel = document.getElementById('palettePanel');
    const colorSwatches = document.getElementById('colorSwatches');
    const palettePrev = document.getElementById('palettePrev');
    const paletteNext = document.getElementById('paletteNext');
    const palettePageInfo = document.getElementById('palettePageInfo');
    const brushSizeInput = document.getElementById('brushSize');
    const brushSizeVal = document.getElementById('brushSizeVal');
    const infoOverlay = document.getElementById('infoOverlay');
    const historyDropdown = document.getElementById('historyDropdown');
    const dashboard = document.getElementById('dashboard');
    const dashboardContent = document.getElementById('dashboardContent');
    const dragOverlay = document.getElementById('dragOverlay');
    const fileInput = document.getElementById('fileInput');
    const batchInput = document.getElementById('batchInput');
    const undoBtn = document.getElementById('undoBtn');
    const redoBtn = document.getElementById('redoBtn');
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('tooltip');
    const selectionsPanel = document.getElementById('selectionsPanel');
    const statusBar = document.getElementById('statusBar');
    const toolBtns = {
    paint: document.getElementById('paintToolBtn'),
    rectangle: document.getElementById('rectToolBtn'),
    select: document.getElementById('selectToolBtn'),
    };
    const offscreen = document.createElement('canvas');
    const offCtx = offscreen.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    offCtx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
    // ----- utility -----
    function updateUndoRedoButtons() {
    undoBtn.disabled = state.undoStack.length === 0;
    redoBtn.disabled = state.redoStack.length === 0;
    }
    function updateInfoOverlay() {
    if (!state.meta) { infoOverlay.innerHTML = t('noImage'); return; }
    const { width, height, rawWidth, factor, filename, bytesPerRow } = state.meta;
    infoOverlay.innerHTML = `
    <strong>${t('filename')}</strong> ${filename || '—'}<br>
    <strong>${t('dimensions')}</strong> ${width} × ${height}<br>
    <strong>${t('rawWidth')}</strong> ${rawWidth}<br>
    <strong>${t('factor')}</strong> ${factor}<br>
    <strong>${t('bytesPerRow')}</strong> ${bytesPerRow}
    `;
    }
    function updateDashboard() {
    const mem = (state.totalMemory / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2);
    dashboardContent.innerHTML = `${t('filesLoaded')} ${state.loadedFilesCount}<br>${t('memoryUsage')} ${mem} MB<br>${t('undoLevels')} ${state.undoStack.length}`;
    }
    function updateUILanguage() {
    document.documentElement.lang = currentLang;
    document.documentElement.dir = currentLang === 'fa' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr';
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
    if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') el.placeholder = t(key);
    else el.textContent = t(key);
    });
    if (state.currentImage) updateInfoOverlay();
    updateDashboard();
    }
    // IndexedDB history
    function openHistoryDB() {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const req = indexedDB.open('ep-viewer-db', 1);
    req.onupgradeneeded = (e) => {
    const db = e.target.result;
    if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('history')) {
    db.createObjectStore('history', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
    }
    };
    req.onsuccess = (e) => resolve(e.target.result);
    req.onerror = reject;
    });
    }
    async function addHistory(fileName, dataUrlThumb) {
    if (!state.historyDB) state.historyDB = await openHistoryDB();
    const tx = state.historyDB.transaction('history', 'readwrite');
    const store = tx.objectStore('history');
    store.add({ name: fileName, thumb: dataUrlThumb, date: Date.now() });
    }
    async function getHistory() {
    if (!state.historyDB) state.historyDB = await openHistoryDB();
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const tx = state.historyDB.transaction('history', 'readonly');
    const store = tx.objectStore('history');
    const req = store.getAll();
    req.onsuccess = () => resolve(req.result.sort((a,b) => b.date - a.date).slice(0, 20));
    });
    }
    // ----- Rendering -----
    function applyTransform() {
    const w = canvas.width = container.clientWidth;
    const h = canvas.height = container.clientHeight;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    if (!state.currentImage) return;
    const imgW = offscreen.width;
    const imgH = offscreen.height;
    const scale = state.zoom;
    if (!state._initialCentered) {
    state.offsetX = (w - imgW * scale) / 2;
    state.offsetY = (h - imgH * scale) / 2;
    state._initialCentered = true;
    }
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(state.offsetX, state.offsetY);
    ctx.scale(scale, scale);
    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
    ctx.drawImage(offscreen, 0, 0);
    if (scale >= state.gridThreshold) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(128,128,128,0.3)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1 / scale;
    for (let x = 0; x <= imgW; x++) { ctx.moveTo(x, 0); ctx.lineTo(x, imgH); }
    for (let y = 0; y <= imgH; y++) { ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(imgW, y); }
    ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.restore();
    if (state.currentTool === 'select' && toolManager.selection.drawing) drawSelectionOverlay();
    else if (state.currentTool === 'rectangle' && toolManager.rect.drawing) drawRectPreview();
    }
    function redraw() { applyTransform(); }
    function drawSelectionOverlay() {
    const sel = toolManager.selection;
    if (sel.startX == null) return;
    const sx = Math.min(sel.startX, sel.endX), sy = Math.min(sel.startY, sel.endY);
    const w = Math.abs(sel.endX - sel.startX) + 1, h = Math.abs(sel.endY - sel.startY) + 1;
    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(state.offsetX, state.offsetY); ctx.scale(state.zoom, state.zoom);
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ffff'; ctx.lineWidth = 1 / state.zoom;
    ctx.setLineDash([4 / state.zoom, 4 / state.zoom]); ctx.strokeRect(sx, sy, w, h); ctx.restore();
    }
    function drawRectPreview() {
    const r = toolManager.rect;
    if (r.startX == null) return;
    const sx = Math.min(r.startX, r.endX), sy = Math.min(r.startY, r.endY);
    const w = Math.abs(r.endX - r.startX) + 1, h = Math.abs(r.endY - r.startY) + 1;
    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(state.offsetX, state.offsetY); ctx.scale(state.zoom, state.zoom);
    if (state.activeSelectionIndex !== null && state.selections[state.activeSelectionIndex]) {
    const sel = state.selections[state.activeSelectionIndex];
    const patCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    patCanvas.width = sel.width; patCanvas.height = sel.height;
    patCanvas.getContext('2d').putImageData(sel.imageData, 0, 0);
    ctx.fillStyle = ctx.createPattern(patCanvas, 'repeat');
    } else {
    ctx.fillStyle = state.brushColor || '#000000';
    }
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4; ctx.fillRect(sx, sy, w, h); ctx.globalAlpha = 1; ctx.restore();
    }
    function setImage(imageData, meta) {
    offscreen.width = imageData.width; offscreen.height = imageData.height;
    offCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    state.currentImage = imageData;
    state.originalImageData = new ImageData(new Uint8ClampedArray(imageData.data), imageData.width, imageData.height);
    state.meta = meta || {};
    state.zoom = 1; state.offsetX = 0; state.offsetY = 0; state._initialCentered = false;
    state.undoStack = []; state.redoStack = [];
    state.selections = []; state.activeSelectionIndex = null;
    updateSelectionsPanel();
    updateUndoRedoButtons();
    extractPalette(imageData);
    updateInfoOverlay();
    redraw();
    palettePanel.classList.add('visible');
    state.loadedFilesCount++;
    updateDashboard();
    deactivateTool();
    state.currentFileName = meta.filename || '';
    const thumbCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    thumbCanvas.width = Math.min(100, imageData.width); thumbCanvas.height = Math.min(100, imageData.height);
    const tCtx = thumbCanvas.getContext('2d'); tCtx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
    tCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0, 0, 0, thumbCanvas.width, thumbCanvas.height);
    addHistory(meta.filename || 'image', thumbCanvas.toDataURL());
    }
    function extractPalette(imageData) {
    const colorMap = new Map();
    const data = imageData.data, len = data.length;
    const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(len / 50000));
    for (let i = 0; i < len; i += 4 * step) {
    const r = data[i], g = data[i+1], b = data[i+2];
    const hex = '#' + [r,g,b].map(c => c.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join('');
    colorMap.set(hex, (colorMap.get(hex) || 0) + 1);
    }
    state.paletteColors = Array.from(colorMap.entries()).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]).slice(0, 32).map(e => e[0]);
    state.palettePage = 0;
    if (state.paletteColors.length > 0 && !state.brushColor) state.brushColor = state.paletteColors[0];
    renderPalettePage();
    }
    function renderPalettePage() {
    const start = state.palettePage * state.palettePerPage;
    const pageColors = state.paletteColors.slice(start, start + state.palettePerPage);
    colorSwatches.innerHTML = '';
    pageColors.forEach(hex => {
    const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'swatch';
    div.style.backgroundColor = hex; div.dataset.color = hex;
    if (hex === state.brushColor) div.classList.add('active');
    div.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.swatch').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
    div.classList.add('active'); state.brushColor = hex;
    });
    colorSwatches.appendChild(div);
    });
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(state.paletteColors.length / state.palettePerPage) || 1;
    palettePageInfo.textContent = `${state.palettePage+1}/${totalPages}`;
    palettePrev.disabled = state.palettePage === 0;
    paletteNext.disabled = state.palettePage >= totalPages - 1;
    }
    palettePrev.addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.palettePage > 0) { state.palettePage--; renderPalettePage(); } });
    paletteNext.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(state.paletteColors.length / state.palettePerPage);
    if (state.palettePage < totalPages - 1) { state.palettePage++; renderPalettePage(); }
    });
    function updateSelectionsPanel() {
    selectionsPanel.innerHTML = '';
    state.selections.forEach((sel, idx) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'sel-thumb';
    if (idx === state.activeSelectionIndex) div.classList.add('active');
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = sel.dataURL;
    div.appendChild(img);
    const label = document.createElement('span');
    label.className = 'sel-label';
    label.textContent = sel.label;
    div.appendChild(label);
    div.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state.activeSelectionIndex = (state.activeSelectionIndex === idx) ? null : idx;
    updateSelectionsPanel();
    redraw();
    });
    selectionsPanel.appendChild(div);
    });
    }
    function addSelection(imageData, label) {
    const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    tempCanvas.width = imageData.width; tempCanvas.height = imageData.height;
    tempCanvas.getContext('2d').putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    state.selections.push({
    id: Date.now(),
    label,
    imageData,
    width: imageData.width,
    height: imageData.height,
    dataURL: tempCanvas.toDataURL()
    });
    state.activeSelectionIndex = state.selections.length - 1;
    updateSelectionsPanel();
    }
    // ----- Tools -----
    function saveUndoState() {
    state.undoStack.push(offCtx.getImageData(0,0,offscreen.width,offscreen.height));
    if (state.undoStack.length > 50) state.undoStack.shift();
    state.redoStack = []; updateUndoRedoButtons();
    }
    function undo() {
    if (state.undoStack.length === 0) return;
    state.redoStack.push(offCtx.getImageData(0,0,offscreen.width,offscreen.height));
    const prev = state.undoStack.pop(); offCtx.putImageData(prev, 0, 0);
    state.currentImage = offCtx.getImageData(0,0,offscreen.width,offscreen.height);
    redraw(); updateUndoRedoButtons();
    }
    function redo() {
    if (state.redoStack.length === 0) return;
    state.undoStack.push(offCtx.getImageData(0,0,offscreen.width,offscreen.height));
    const next = state.redoStack.pop(); offCtx.putImageData(next, 0, 0);
    state.currentImage = offCtx.getImageData(0,0,offscreen.width,offscreen.height);
    redraw(); updateUndoRedoButtons();
    }
    function updateTooltip(clientX, clientY, text) {
    tooltip.style.display = 'block'; tooltip.textContent = text;
    const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
    let left = clientX - rect.left + 15, top = clientY - rect.top - 25;
    if (left + tooltip.offsetWidth > rect.width) left = rect.width - tooltip.offsetWidth - 5;
    if (top < 0) top = 5;
    tooltip.style.left = left + 'px'; tooltip.style.top = top + 'px';
    }
    function deactivateTool() { if (toolManager.activeTool) toolManager.deactivate(); }
    class ToolManager {
    constructor() {
    this.activeTool = null;
    this.rect = { startX: null, startY: null, endX: null, endY: null, drawing: false };
    this.selection = { startX: null, startY: null, endX: null, endY: null, drawing: false };
    }
    activate(toolName) {
    if (this.activeTool) this.deactivate();
    this.activeTool = toolName; state.currentTool = toolName;
    Object.values(toolBtns).forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
    if (toolBtns[toolName]) toolBtns[toolName].classList.add('active');
    container.style.cursor = 'crosshair';
    if (toolName === 'rectangle') container.classList.add('rectangle');
    else if (toolName === 'select') container.classList.add('select');
    else if (toolName === 'paint') container.classList.add('painting');
    redraw();
    }
    deactivate() {
    if (this.activeTool === 'rectangle') this.rect.drawing = false;
    if (this.activeTool === 'select') this.selection.drawing = false;
    this.activeTool = null; state.currentTool = null;
    Object.values(toolBtns).forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
    container.classList.remove('painting', 'rectangle', 'select');
    container.style.cursor = 'grab';
    tooltip.style.display = 'none'; redraw();
    }
    handleMouseDown(e) {
    if (!state.currentImage) return;
    const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left, mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    const imgX = Math.floor((mouseX - state.offsetX) / state.zoom);
    const imgY = Math.floor((mouseY - state.offsetY) / state.zoom);
    if (imgX < 0 || imgX >= offscreen.width || imgY < 0 || imgY >= offscreen.height) return;
    if (this.activeTool === 'paint') { toolPaint.startDrawing(imgX, imgY); }
    else if (this.activeTool === 'rectangle') {
    this.rect.startX = imgX; this.rect.startY = imgY; this.rect.endX = imgX; this.rect.endY = imgY; this.rect.drawing = true;
    updateTooltip(mouseX, mouseY, `Rect: (${imgX},${imgY})`);
    } else if (this.activeTool === 'select') {
    this.selection.startX = imgX; this.selection.startY = imgY; this.selection.endX = imgX; this.selection.endY = imgY; this.selection.drawing = true;
    updateTooltip(mouseX, mouseY, `Select: (${imgX},${imgY})`);
    }
    redraw();
    }
    handleMouseMove(e) {
    if (!state.currentImage) return;
    const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left, mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
    const imgX = Math.floor((mouseX - state.offsetX) / state.zoom);
    const imgY = Math.floor((mouseY - state.offsetY) / state.zoom);
    if (this.activeTool === 'paint' && toolPaint.isDrawing) { toolPaint.draw(imgX, imgY); }
    else if (this.activeTool === 'rectangle' && this.rect.drawing) {
    this.rect.endX = Math.max(0, Math.min(offscreen.width-1, imgX));
    this.rect.endY = Math.max(0, Math.min(offscreen.height-1, imgY));
    View remainder of file in raw view
